title: FPS Displayer
description: Advanced FPS display mod with game statistics
body:
# JustProject FPS Display Mod

Advanced FPS display mod for Minecraft 1.16.5 with comprehensive game statistics.

## ✨ Features
- Real-time FPS counter with colors
- Player coordinates (X, Y, Z)  
- CPS counter (clicks per second)
- Armor durability percentages
- Entity info when looking at mobs
- Custom key binding system
- GUI configuration

## 🎮 Commands
- `.bind <key> <command>` - Create key bind
- `.binds` - List active binds  
- `.unbind <key>` - Remove bind
- `/binds` - GUI bind settings

## ⚙️ Configuration
In-game: `Options` → `JustProject Settings`

**Requires:** Minecraft 1.16.5, Forge 36.2.42+
